abilities.name: Refined Creations
abilities.flavor: Ossifectors are always looking to improve upon their work, wielding necrotic sorcery to augment their creations in battle.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 5+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Switch Aspects
abilities.flavor: Stalkers are imbued with a powerful skill by whichever of their skulls faces the foe, switching from defence to offence in the blink of an eye.
abilities.effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the turn: Blade-parry Aspect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target this unit. Destroyer Aspect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this unit’s combat attacks.

abilities.name: Soulbound Protectors
abilities.flavor: Immortis Guard will use their own bodies to shield their rulers from harm.
abilities.effect: Your general has WARD ( 5+ ) while they are within this unit’s combat range .

abilities.name: Heralds Of Nagash
abilities.flavor: The Morghast are the embodiment of Nagash's will and require no commander to function with utmost efficacy as a result.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to discipline rolls for this unit while it is not wholly within 12" of your general .

battleTraits.name: Dread Descent
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
